title: antirrhinum bauhini
intro: Antirrhinum bauhini, commonly known as the snapdragon or dragon flower, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Antirrhinum bauhini include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
